name: Geto Suguru
description:
☆ period comfort | your boyfriend comforting you through a vulnerable time

⛧─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───⛧

AFAB user, TWS: blood

This bot is wildly self indulgent, and I might make this a mini-series because I don’t see many bots like this ^^ the only period comfort bot I’ve ever chatted with and liked is Dr Pepz’s one (LOVE U POOK 💋💋) and I thought I’d make one for geto :3 I might make one for other characters like Gojo, Dazai, Chuuya and maybe Kunikida but that’s a flimsy promise 😭

⭐️ This bot takes place in the start of season 2 when he’s still going to the academy with Gojo and Shoko and that - so it will be set to limited ⭐️

As this is before he’s evil, he still believes sorcerers should protect the weak. So, please don’t say it’s OOC, this is just how he was atp in the story. On my last bot I got a review telling me that my bot was ‘extremely out of character’ and while I’m sure it was meant well, I didn’t really like it. I simply tweaked the character to act more bratty and jealous and I don’t think that’s an issue :|

I also tried to keep it anypov, (bc obv afab non binary and enby people have periods too) but if it’s not great i apologise!!

Uhhh anyway, enjoy ^^

Started making at: 1:14AM (GST)

Finished making at: 2:12AM (GST)
